name: Hidden Valley Ranch Style Fajitas
recipeIngredient: 2 packages Hidden Valley Ranch Salad Dressing (Dry mix-use Milk)
toppings: guacamole -- sour cream, -- picante sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Pierce the steak all over with a fork.
2. In a bowl, combine oil, lime juice, Hidden Valley Ranch Salad Dressing (use Milk), cumin, and black pepper.
3. Pour the dressing mixture over the steak and cover. Refrigerate overnight.
4. Grill or broil the steak, using the marinade to baste.
5. Slice the steak diagonally across the grain into thin slices.
6. Roll the slices in warmed tortillas.
7. Serve with toppings such as guacamole, sour cream, and picante sauce.
8. Serves 6.
